overall.description: A third-person gameplay sequence from Horizon Forbidden West showing the protagonist Aloy walking along a rainy beach with a massive mechanical structure in the distance. The character climbs a rocky outcrop to observe large crashing waves before the camera pans across the open ocean to reveal distant mountains.

scene_state.functional_zone: sandy beach shoreline with tidal waves

agents.ego_description: walking along the shoreline toward a rocky outcrop with a large mechanical structure visible in the distant ocean

entered.detail: wet sand along the shoreline with water reflections
turquoise ocean water with gentle waves
massive futuristic mechanical structure rising from the ocean mist
dark rock formation along the beach edge
visible rain falling from cloudy sky

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a wide beach with wet sand reflecting the overcast sky. The character walks along the shoreline as rain falls gently. In the distance, a massive mechanical tower looms through the ocean mist while waves roll toward the beach.

events.description: dissolve transition as character moves onto the rocky outcrop
character begins climbing up the rock formation

agents.ego_description: climbing up the rocky outcrop on the right side of the beach to gain higher ground

entered.detail: white foam from waves breaking on the shore

segments.scene_description: Following a transition effect, the character is now positioned on the rocky outcrop at the beach's edge, climbing upward as waves crash against the rocks below. The mechanical tower remains visible in the background through the mist.

events.description: large wave crashes against the rocks sending spray into the air
massive wave breaks directly in front of the rocks creating a wall of white water

agents.ego_description: standing on the rocky outcrop watching the powerful waves crash against the shore

entered.detail: misty mountain range visible across the ocean
mist and spray from breaking waves

segments.scene_description: The character stands on the rocks as massive waves crash dramatically against the shore, sending spray into the air. The camera captures the power of the ocean while the mechanical tower looms closer on the right and distant mountains become visible on the left horizon.

events.description: camera begins panning left across the ocean, character exits frame

agents.ego_description: no longer in frame as camera focuses on the open ocean vista

entered.detail: distant shoreline covered in dark forest

segments.scene_description: The camera pans left across the open ocean, leaving the character and mechanical structure behind. The view opens up to reveal a vast seascape with distant mountains and forested coastlines under the rainy sky, emphasizing the scale of the environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a rainy shoreline that ascends a rocky cliff before panning across a vast, open seascape. It begins with the character walking along a wide beach of wet, reflective sand as a massive mechanical tower looms through the ocean mist. As the perspective shifts, the camera follows the character climbing a rocky outcrop while waves crash violently against the stones below. The scene then expands to capture the dramatic spray of the ocean and the looming tower to the right, while distant mountains emerge on the left horizon. Finally, the camera pans away from the character and the structure to reveal a wide expanse of open water and forested coastlines under a rainy sky.
